# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive CI/CD Logging

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Log environment variables
        run: env

      - name: Run commands and log output
        run: |
          # Run commands and capture output
          command_output=$(command)
          echo "Command output: $command_output"

      - name: Log deployment details
        run: |
          # Get deployment details and log them
          deployment_details=$(deployment get)
          echo "Deployment details: $deployment_details"

      - name: Log API responses
        run: |
          # Send API requests and log responses
          api_response=$(curl -X GET <api_endpoint>)
          echo "API response: $api_response"

      - name: Log connection strings
        run: |
          # Access connection strings and log them
          connection_string=$(cat connection_string.txt)
          echo "Connection string: $connection_string"

      - name: Upload logs
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: logs
          path: logs/
